causalAutopsy.notes: The autonomous-progress-heartbeat feature (PR #1207) added 3 fail-safe catch blocks that the no-silent-fallbacks ratchet flagged (count 476->479), turning CI red on unit shard 3/4. The catches lacked the @silent-fallback-ok exemption marker despite being fail-safe (surfaced via events or fail-closed sentinels), not silent. Fix tags them with written justifications; comment-only, zero behavior change.
